description: Plugin-distributed hooks for open-source-maintenance. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 3 mechanically-detectable OSS-hygiene smells — (1) a versioned manifest with no CHANGELOG, (2) a manifest with no license field, (3) a CHANGELOG with breaking wording but no BREAKING marker. Set OSS_MAINT_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
